items.title: Fix auth-state hydration mismatch in Frontend Web 🎉
items.summary: This update addresses an issue where the top header bar rendered too tall due to an auth-state hydration mismatch. By consolidating the rendering of both logged-in and logged-out states into a single container, the header height is now consistently maintained at 60px, eliminating the previous inflation issue. The fix ensures a clean hydration process, improving the overall user experience.
